headline: Nebius Group Recasts AI Future With Eigen AI Deal And Mega Partnerships
summary: Nebius Group (NasdaqGS:NBIS) announced a $643 million acquisition of Eigen AI, adding advanced inference and optimization technology to its AI platform. The company has secured multi billion dollar, long term contracts with Meta and Microsoft tied to its AI infrastructure and platform services. Nvidia is committing a $2 billion investment into Nebius, aligning with Nebius’s shift toward a Platform as a Service model. headline: Dell’s Pangea 5 Win Highlights AI And Energy Computing Ambitions
summary: Dell Technologies and Nvidia have been chosen by TotalEnergies to design and install Pangea 5, a new high performance supercomputer for seismic imaging and AI research in energy. The project expands Dell's role in high performance computing infrastructure, targeting both AI driven research and energy efficiency for a major global energy company. Pangea 5 positions Dell as a key supplier to demanding, regulated industries that require large scale, energy conscious computing power. For...
